---
title: "Home"
toc: false
---

::: {.columns .home-hero}
::: {.column width="65%"}

# Victor Frankenstein

<div class="home-subtitle">Computational Neurobiologist · UK Dementia Research Institute</div>

I investigate what happens when biology stops behaving.

My research focuses on the molecular failures that drive
neurodegeneration — particularly how proteins misfold,
aggregate, and propagate across neural circuits.

Using a combination of experimental neuroscience,
spatial transcriptomics, and computational analysis,
I study how small molecular errors can eventually lead
to large-scale loss of brain function.

Earlier in my career I was perhaps a little too enthusiastic
about experimenting with the boundaries of life and death.
These days my work is much more focused on understanding
how to preserve neurons rather than reanimating them.

*Frankenstein Group · UK Dementia Research Institute*

{{< include _partials/links.html >}}

:::

::: {.column width="35%"}

![](assets/images/profile.png){.profile-pic fig-alt="Victor Frankenstein portrait"}

:::
:::

---

## Focus areas

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

### Protein misbehaviour

Understanding how proteins such as tau adopt pathological
structures and spread through neural circuits in
neurodegenerative disease.

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

### Spatial brain mapping

Using spatial transcriptomics to identify vulnerable
cell populations and map disease progression
through the brain.

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

### Reproducible science

Building computational workflows that make complex
biological analyses transparent, shareable,
and reproducible.

:::

:::

---

## Start here

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card}

[**Projects →**](pages/projects.qmd)

Case studies describing research questions,
methods used, and where the evidence lives.

:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card}

[**Résumé for Research →**](pages/resume.qmd)

A narrative CV describing contributions to
knowledge, people, the research community,
and broader society.

:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card}

[**Outputs →**](pages/outputs.qmd)

Publications, talks, datasets, software,
and other things released into the world.

:::
:::

:::
